summary: 0.6.61 is a narrow CUA development-control slice: confirm that the later Unity button 5 fallback remains backed out, expose a manual checkbox for the direct disableNavigation capture bit, and leave the rest of the focus and input-capture path intact.
operatorSignals: The operator wanted to confirm that the old button 5 nav override work had actually been backed out.
The operator wanted to know whether there was a single direct flag controlling navigation disable behavior.
The operator wanted a manual checkbox for that behavior so development can continue without getting trapped by it.
actionsTaken: Confirmed that the live override path still uses thumbstick-click only and does not reintroduce the later Unity button 5 fallback.
Confirmed that the direct disableNavigation bit exists in the CUA navigation snapshot path.
Exposed a manual FrameAngel Player Disable Navigation checkbox that gates only that direct bit while CUA capture is active.
nonGoals: No movie transport, image transport, sync, or shuffle changes in this slice.
No new grab-nav model or broader focus-behavior changes in this slice.
